name_en: B brand refined tote bag, exquisite silhouette, crafted from plaid and topstitched leather. Features a top leather handle for hand-carrying or an adjustable shoulder strap. At least 30% of the main materials in this piece are bio-based. Bio-based materials are primarily derived from plants and castor oil, other renewable natural resources. 23 x 8 x 19cm. Top leather handle. Adjustable shoulder strap. 1 magnetic snap flap outer pocket; 1 inner slip pocket. Snap closure. Hand-painted edges. Glossy metal hardware. Luggage tag
